title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India Holdings Services in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India Holdings Services:
Alstom India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India Holdings Services!
